title: Event type catalog
description: Reference table of the 11 event_type enum values with typical durations + compatible formats + notes on which tenant business_types most commonly use each. Loaded by EventProvisioner + rendered on the create form.

tournament.label: Tournament
tournament.description: Competitive multi-round tournament. Teams or individuals compete for placement + prize pool.

match.label: Match / Game
match.description: Single competitive fixture between two teams / individuals.

showcase.label: Showcase
showcase.description: Non-competitive display for scouts / recruiters / parents.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.description: Skill-focused instructional session. Usually one instructor + N attendees.

camp.label: Camp
camp.description: Multi-day intensive program. Summer / winter camps.

conference.label: Conference
conference.description: Professional / educational conference with multiple sessions.

social.label: Social event
social.description: Community-building event. BBQs, mixers, team dinners.

graduation.label: Graduation
graduation.description: End-of-season / end-of-program ceremony recognizing athlete achievements.

awards_ceremony.label: Awards ceremony
awards_ceremony.description: Formal recognition event with awards presentation.

open_house.label: Open house
open_house.description: Prospective-family showcase. Introduces the tenant to potential new registrants.

other.label: Other
other.description: Tenant-defined event type. Use only when standard types don't fit.
